query:
UPDATE videos SET status='failed', progressStep='Pipeline killed — switching to stock-image only mode' WHERE id=72;
SELECT id, status, progressStep, progressPercent FROM videos WHERE status='generating' OR id=72 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
